description: Style NoteBrilliance in garments comes in the form of these dark grey trousers from Reid And Taylor – a brand with a rich Scottish heritage in specialised men's apparel. Strive for classiness when you pair them with a crisp formal shirt for a professional look.Product DetailsDark grey formal trousers with a metal zip, buttoned frontMaterial and CarePolyester viscose blendMachine wash cold in mild detergent wash dark colors separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeUse medium heat steam iron, do not iron on prints or embellishments.Size and FitClassic fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
